versions.version_description: Original key is F. I wrote Capo5 play C. added Dm7/G and G7 before the chorus part. and simplified most of chords.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb2/C[/ch]  x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I know this pain,         why do you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
lock yourself up in these chains?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Bb/C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
No one can change your life ex-cept for you       Don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Bb/C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Ever let anyone step all over you.     Just[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Bb2[/ch]   [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Open your heart and your mind,  mm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Is it really fair to feel this way inside?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                                       [ch]C/F[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Some day somebody's gonna make you want to turn around and say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]C/F[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Until then baby are you going to let him hold you down and make you cry?[/tab]
Don't you know?
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]C/F[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you know,   things can change?  Things'll go your way[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]
If you hold on for one more day,     can you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]
Hold on for one more day - Things'll go your way[/tab]
N.C.
Hold on for one more day (Play Intro)

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb2[/ch]
You could sustain,         or are you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Comfortable with the pain?              You've got[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb2[/ch]             [ch]C/F[/ch]
No one to blame for your unhappiness      no, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
You got your-self into your own mess[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb2[/ch]
Lettin' your worries pass you by,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]F2/A[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Don't you think it's worth your time, to change your mind?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                                       [ch]C/F[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Some day somebody's gonna make you want to turn around and say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]C/F[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Until then baby are you going to let him hold you down and make you cry?[/tab]
Don't you know?
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb/F[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you know,   things can change?  Things'll go your way[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]
If you hold on for one more day,     can you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]
Hold on for one more day - Things'll go your way[/tab]
N.C.
Hold on for one more day

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb2/F[/ch]
I know that there is pain, but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb2/F[/ch]
Hold on for one more day and[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb2/F[/ch]
Break free from the chains[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb2/F[/ch]
Yeah I know that there is pain, but you hold on for one more day and you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb2/F[/ch]
Break free, break from the chains[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                                      [ch]C/F[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Some day somebody's gonna make you want to turn around and say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]C/F[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Until then baby are you going to let him hold you down and make you cry?[/tab]
Don't you know?
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you know,   things can change?  Things'll go your way[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]
If you hold on for one more day,     can you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C/F[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Hold on for one more day,yeah.  Hold       On[/tab]
